    I

    IDLE - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.enemy.entities.Robot.RobotAction
     
    IDLE - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.Player.PlayerActions
     
    increasePlays(int) - Method in class model.Profile
     
    increaseWins(int) - Method in class model.Profile
     
    inProgress() - Method in class model.Play
     
    INPROGRESS - Enum constant in enum class model.Play.PlayState
     
    insertPoint(String, int) - Method in class model.Leaderboard
    Insert the new Record by giving the ID (first 5 letter of the current profile player in that moment) and points (accumulated during the game).
    Interactable - Class in model.entity.detectable
    Detectable entity that allows an additional interactions with the Player.
    Interactable(float, float, int, int) - Constructor for class model.entity.detectable.Interactable
    Interactable constructor, detectable entity that can be interacted by the player
    InteractableManager - Class in model.entity.detectable
    Main manager of the interactables entities, used to help with the interactions between Interactable (closer to the Player) and Player.
    InteractableManager(List, List, Optional) - Constructor for class model.entity.detectable.InteractableManager
    InteractableManager constructor that collects the furnitures, the terminals and the control room
    INTERRUPTED - Enum constant in enum class model.Play.PlayState

    isChecking() - Method in class model.entity.Player
     
    isChosen() - Method in class model.Profile
    Used to put back to this profile when the game is open if is chosen
    isControlRoom() - Method in class model.entity.detectable.InteractableManager
     
    isDead() - Method in class model.entity.Player
     
    isDestroyed() - Method in class model.entity.enemy.entities.Ball
    Destruction check
    isEnded() - Method in class model.Play
     
    isFree(float, float, int[][], Optional) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Checks if the tile in the give position is free from solid tiles and lift
    isFullyOn(Player) - Method in class model.entity.detectable.LiftManager
    Check if the player is fully on the lift setting also the current lift the Player is on
    isFurniture() - Method in class model.entity.detectable.InteractableManager
     
    isIdle() - Method in class model.entity.Player
     
    isIn(float, float) - Method in class model.entity.detectable.entities.Lift
    Checks the position inserted in input is within the lift hitbox
    isInAir() - Method in class model.entity.Player
     
    isInMovingLift() - Method in class model.entity.Player
     
    isInteracting() - Method in class model.entity.detectable.entities.Furniture
     
    isInTheWay(Entity) - Method in class model.entity.detectable.entities.Lift
    Checks if the entity given is on the way of a moving platform
    isJ() - Method in class model.entity.Player
    Jump input check
    isL() - Method in class model.entity.Player
    Left input check
    isLift(float, float) - Method in class model.entity.detectable.LiftManager
    Checks if the given position is within any lift
    isLift(float, float, Optional) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Checks if the tile in the give position is a lift in the given lift data, unless is null which gives directly false
    isMoving() - Method in class model.entity.Player
     
    isMoving() - Method in class model.level.Elevator
    Checks if the Elevator is moving
    isNear(Player) - Method in class model.entity.detectable.InteractableManager
    The difference between this and nearInteractable is this one doesn't alterate the currentInteractable, giving only the information if the player is near an interactable
    isOnSomething(Rectangle2D.Float, int[][], Optional) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Check if the hitbox is on something that is a floor or a lift
    isOnTheFloor(Rectangle2D.Float, int[][]) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Check if the hitbox is on top of a floor
    isOnTheLift(Rectangle2D.Float, int) - Method in class model.entity.detectable.LiftManager
    Check if the hitbox is on top of the lift
    isOnTheLift(Rectangle2D.Float, Optional) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Check if the hitbox is on top of a lift
    isPathFree(float, float, float, float, int[][]) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Check if you can move in this position with lvData
    isPathFree(float, float, float, float, int[][], Optional) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Check if you can move in this position with lvData and lfData
    isPathFree(float, float, float, float, Optional) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Check if you can move in this position with lfData
    isPlaying() - Method in class model.Game
    Play check
    isR() - Method in class model.entity.Player
    Right input check

    isRight() - Method in class model.entity.Player
     
    isRolling() - Method in class model.entity.Player

    Checks if the audio given is running
    isSolid(float, float, int[][]) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Checks if the tile in the given position is solid in the given level data
    isSoundsEnabled() - Method in class view.util.AudioManager
